form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resumes. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at this track Bm58 October 19 over 1110m, 6 len behind Snow Falcon with 58kg at $5. When resuming last campaign fourth of 9 at Doomben 4yo+ Mdn-Sw May 28 over 1110m, 2 len behind Make A Call carrying 55kg at $3.20. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Looks all set for a bright return.
